scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('public/hot',{force:true})" && vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});function cp(s,d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const S=p.join(s,e.name),D=p.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){fs.mkdirSync(D,{recursive:true});cp(S,D)}else fs.copyFileSync(S,D)}}if(fs.existsSync('public/build'))cp('public/build','dist')" && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('public/hot',{force:true})"
scripts.build:dev: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('public/hot',{force:true})" && vite build --mode development && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});function cp(s,d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const S=p.join(s,e.name),D=p.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){fs.mkdirSync(D,{recursive:true});cp(S,D)}else fs.copyFileSync(S,D)}}if(fs.existsSync('public/build'))cp('public/build','dist')" && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('public/hot',{force:true})"
